sentences.arabic: يَشْهَدُ النِّظَامُ الِاقْتِصَادِيُّ الْعَالَمِيُّ مَخَاضًا عَسِيرًا فِي هَذِهِ الْمَرْحَلَةِ التَّارِيخِيَّةِ.
sentences.translation: Globalni ekonomski sistem prolazi kroz težak porođaj u ovoj istorijskoj fazi.
sentences.translationEn: The global economic system is undergoing a difficult labor in this historical phase.

sentences.arabic: تَتَجَلَّى هَذِهِ الصُّعُوبَةُ فِي التَّجَاذُبَاتِ بَيْنَ ضَرُورَاتِ النُّمُوِّ الْمُتَسَارِعِ وَمُتَطَلَّبَاتِ الْبِيئَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova poteškoća se ogleda u tenzijama između imperativa ubrzanog rasta i ekoloških zahtjeva.
sentences.translationEn: This difficulty is reflected in the tensions between the imperatives of accelerated growth and environmental requirements.

sentences.arabic: لَقَدْ أَضْحَتْ ظَاهِرَةُ التَّغَيُّرِ الْمُنَاخِيِّ حَقِيقَةً صَارِخَةً لَا تَقْبَلُ الشَّكَّ أَوِ التَّأْوِيلَ.
sentences.translation: Fenomen klimatskih promjena postao je nepobitna stvarnost koja ne prihvata sumnju ili tumačenje.
sentences.translationEn: The phenomenon of climate change has become an undeniable reality that accepts no doubt or interpretation.

sentences.arabic: مِمَّا دَفَعَ صُنَّاعَ الْقَرَارِ إِلَى الْبَحْثِ عَنْ نَمَاذِجَ اقْتِصَادِيَّةٍ خَضْرَاءَ بَدِيلَةٍ.
sentences.translation: To je potaknulo donosioce odluka da traže alternativne zelene ekonomske modele.
sentences.translationEn: This has prompted decision-makers to seek alternative green economic models.

sentences.arabic: تَرْتَكِزُ هَذِهِ النَّمَاذِجُ عَلَى مَبْدَأِ الِاسْتِدَامَةِ بَدَلًا مِنَ الِاسْتِنْزَافِ الْجَائِرِ لِلْمَوَارِدِ.
sentences.translation: Ovi modeli se zasnivaju na principu održivosti umjesto na nepravednom iscrpljivanju resursa.
sentences.translationEn: These models are based on the principle of sustainability instead of the unjust depletion of resources.

sentences.arabic: بَيْدَ أَنَّ هَذَا التَّحَوُّلَ الْجَوْهَرِيَّ لَيْسَ مَحْفُوفًا بِالْوُرُودِ كَمَا يَتَخَيَّلُ الْبَعْضُ.
sentences.translation: Međutim, ova suštinska tranzicija nije posuta ružama kao što neki zamišljaju.
sentences.translationEn: However, this fundamental transition is not paved with roses as some imagine.

sentences.arabic: إِذْ تَتَصَادَمُ مَصَالِحُ الْقُوَى الصِّنَاعِيَّةِ الْكُبْرَى مَعَ تَطَلُّعَاتِ الدُّوَلِ النَّامِيَةِ الْفَقِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Interesi velikih industrijskih sila sukobljavaju se sa težnjama siromašnih zemalja u razvoju.
sentences.translationEn: The interests of major industrial powers clash with the aspirations of poor developing nations.

sentences.arabic: تَرَى هَذِهِ الدُّوَلُ فِي الْقُيُودِ الْبِيئِيَّةِ عَرْقَلَةً لِمَسِيرَتِهَا التَّنْمَوِيَّةِ الْمَشْرُوعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove zemlje vide u ekološkim ograničenjima prepreku svom legitimnom razvojnom putu.
sentences.translationEn: These countries view environmental restrictions as a hindrance to their legitimate developmental path.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ الِاسْتِثْمَارَ فِي الطَّاقَةِ الْمُتَجَدِّدَةِ لَمْ يَعُدْ مُجَرَّدَ تَرَفٍ فِكْرِيٍّ أَوْ نَظَرِيٍّ.
sentences.translation: Ulaganje u obnovljive izvore energije više nije samo intelektualni ili teoretski luksuz.
sentences.translationEn: Investing in renewable energy is no longer just an intellectual or theoretical luxury.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ صَارَ ضَرُورَةً جِيُوسِيَاسِيَّةً مُلِحَّةً لِتَقْلِيلِ الِاعْتِمَادِ عَلَى الْوَقُودِ الْأَحْفُورِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, postalo je hitna geopolitička nužnost za smanjenje ovisnosti o fosilnim gorivima.
sentences.translationEn: On the contrary, it has become an urgent geopolitical necessity to reduce dependence on fossil fuels.

sentences.arabic: كَانَ هَذَا الْوَقُودُ طَالَمَا مِحْوَرًا لِلنِّزَاعَاتِ الدَّوْلِيَّةِ وَالْحُرُوبِ الْمُدَمِّرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova goriva su dugo bila centar međunarodnih sukoba i razornih ratova.
sentences.translationEn: These fuels have long been the center of international conflicts and devastating wars.

sentences.arabic: وَمَعَ ذَلِكَ، فَإِنَّ الْإِرَادَةَ السِّيَاسِيَّةَ الْعَالَمِيَّةَ لَا تَزَالُ تَتَرَنَّحُ بِشَكْلٍ مَلْحُوظٍ.
sentences.translation: Ipak, globalna politička volja i dalje primjetno tetura.
sentences.translationEn: Nevertheless, global political will still noticeably wavers.

sentences.arabic: هِيَ تَتَأَرْجَحُ بَيْنَ الْتِزَامَاتِ قِمَمِ الْمُنَاخِ وَالضُّغُوطِ الدَّاخِلِيَّةِ لِلُّوبِيَّاتِ.
sentences.translation: Ona se koleba između obaveza sa klimatskih samita i unutrašnjih pritisaka lobija.
sentences.translationEn: It oscillates between climate summit commitments and the internal pressures of lobbies.

sentences.arabic: إِنَّ إِيجَادَ صِيغَةٍ تَوْفِيقِيَّةٍ تَجْمَعُ بَيْنَ الرَّفَاهِ وَالسَّلَامَةِ الْإِيكُولُوجِيَّةِ هُوَ التَّحَدِّي الْأَصْعَبُ.
sentences.translation: Pronalaženje kompromisne formule koja spaja blagostanje i ekološku sigurnost najteži je izazov.
sentences.translationEn: Finding a compromise formula that combines prosperity and ecological safety is the most difficult challenge.

sentences.arabic: وَفِي نِهَايَةِ الْمَطَافِ، فَإِنَّ الْكَارِثَةَ الْبِيئِيَّةَ الْقَادِمَةَ لَا تَعْرِفُ أَيَّ حُدُودٍ جُغْرَافِيَّةٍ.
sentences.translation: Na kraju krajeva, nadolazeća ekološka katastrofa ne poznaje nikakve geografske granice.
sentences.translationEn: Ultimately, the coming environmental disaster knows no geographical borders.

sentences.arabic: لَنْ يَنْجُوَ أَحَدٌ إِذَا مَا اسْتَمَرَّتْ وَتِيرَةُ الِانْبِعَاثَاتِ الْكَرْبُونِيَّةِ فِي الِارْتِفَاعِ.
sentences.translation: Niko neće biti pošteđen ako se nastavi ludi tempo emisije ugljika.
sentences.translationEn: No one will be spared if the frantic pace of carbon emissions continues to rise.

sentences.arabic: يَتَطَلَّبُ الْأَمْرُ تَعَاوُنًا دَوْلِيًّا غَيْرَ مَسْبُوقٍ لِإِنْقَاذِ كَوْكَبِنَا الْمُشْتَرَكِ.
sentences.translation: Situacija zahtijeva međunarodnu saradnju bez presedana kako bi se spasila naša zajednička planeta.
sentences.translationEn: The situation requires unprecedented international cooperation to save our shared planet.
